beautyMoments.trigonometry-circle: One point moving in a circle generates every wave in nature.
beautyMoments.projectile-motion: Horizontal and vertical motion are completely independent.
beautyMoments.wave-interference: Two waves can cancel each other — yet both still exist.
beautyMoments.derivatives-visual: The derivative of position is velocity. Of velocity is acceleration. One operation, three concepts.
beautyMoments.redox-reactions: Rust, fire, and batteries are all the same reaction at different speeds.
beautyMoments.dna-synthesis: Four bases. Twenty amino acids. Every living thing runs on this code.
beautyMoments.electrolysis: With electricity, you can run chemistry backwards.
beautyMoments.natural-selection: No one planned anything. The environment kept what worked.
beautyMoments.essay-architect: A perfectly structured argument has the elegance of a mathematical proof.
beautyMoments.economic-indicators: Six numbers describe the health of 1.4 billion people.
beautyMoments.trig-identities: sin²θ + cos²θ = 1 is Pythagoras wearing trigonometry's clothes.
beautyMoments.climate-systems: The Earth is a system of systems. Small changes cascade.
